age_turns.description: Clear tool results older than this many turns when also exceeding size threshold.

size_bytes_threshold.description: Skip clearing for result bodies smaller than this many bytes.

preserve_recent_kinds.description: Result kinds (e.g. "error", "user_question") that are never cleared regardless of age.

drop_strategy.description: How to drop a stale tool result. replace_with_envelope keeps the call/result pair with a marker body (default). full_drop removes the message entirely (risks tool_use/tool_result pairing breakage).
